Venue & Local Information

IIT Ropar, India

ISORC 2027 is planned to be hosted at the Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, a modern research-intensive institute in Punjab, India.

Host Campus

A focused academic environment for systems research

IIT Ropar provides a strong research setting for computer science, engineering, embedded systems, and distributed computing. The campus environment is well suited for a focused, single-track academic symposium, technical discussions, poster sessions, and community networking.

Local support placeholders include the Department of Computer Science and Engineering and POEMS Lab — Parallel, Operating, Edge, and Mobile Systems Lab.

Local Support

  • Host: Department of Computer Science and Engineering, IIT Ropar
  • Local lab support: SDSN — Smart Distributed Systems and Networking Lab
  • Venue room details: coming soon
  • Campus map: coming soon

ISORC 2027

30th IEEE International Symposium on Real-Time Distributed Computing

April 2–4, 2027 · Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, India

Host

Department of Computer Science and Engineering, IIT Ropar

Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, Punjab, India

Contact
